titleStmt.title: SII 7.345: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 345. (A.R. No. 152 of 1901). ON THE FOURTH SLAB SET UP IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . śrīgurubhyō namaḥ . ni¨rvvighnamastu . namastūṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāma
racāravē . trayilōkya nagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . śrīśāradāya namaḥ svastiśrī . ja
yādbhudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣa 1424 saṁdu yippatta Ayidaneya va¨rttamāna du¨rmati saṁvatsara
da māgha śu 1Śu. 1 is clear on the impression. The the requirements of Kapila-shashṭhī given in L.D. Swami kannu Pillai's Ephemeris, Vol. I., p. 37.kapilaśaṣṭi pu(ṁ)ṇyakālada bhrugu rēvatiyalū śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara
śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīranarasiṁgarāyaru vijayanagariya rājadhāniyalu duṣṭanigraha
śiṣṭasratipālane va¨rṇnāśramadhaṁ¨rmaṁgaḷanu naḍasiha kāladalu Ā vīranarasiṁgarāyara nirūpadalu bārakūra
rājyavanu keṁḍada basavarasavoḍeyaru Aḷuva kāladalu cōḷiyakē¨ryya kellaṁgeṟeya vināyakadēvara gōpinā
thadēvara saṁnidhiyalu beḷāna baḷiya puruṣaṇaseṭṭiyara moṁmaga hariyapaseṭiyara dugaṇa hegaḍeyara A
ḷiya duggaseṭiyaru taṁma gurugaḷaha puṁṇyaśravaṇavoḍeyara nirūpadalu māḍida chatramaṭhada dha¨r(ṁ)mmakke
ne barasida śilāsāśanada kramaveṁteṁdare prati di 1 kkaṁ Uṁba ja 5 Aḍige māḍuva brāhmaṇa ja 1 Ubha
yaṁ ja 6 kaṁ prativaruṣa 1 kaṁ Aki muḍi votada hāneyallu Akki mu 60 kkaṁ yī Akige bāḷa
vivara baḍagakaipāḍiya voḷage viṣṇubāhirikaya koṁḍadivāsada bāḷa catusīmeya vivara mū
ḍalu hoḷeyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu Uḍuvara baḷiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu samudradiṁ
mūḍalu baḍagalu joradoragaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yī catusīmevoḷage bittuva gade nāghaṁḍuga
dalli muḍi 2 yī bāḷanu Ā¨rruvāravāgi yirisi kaḍaṁgoṁḍadu bārakūrige saluva ga 115 A
bāḷa mēle mayisālavāgi tegadukoṁḍadu va ga 20 vubhayaṁ Akṣāradalu doḍḍa va ga 135 yī
hoṁnige baḍi varuṣa 1 kaṁ Āki mu 20 mataṁ voḷatūroḷage kuṁjaura bayalavūḷage kallagadeya gaḍi vivara
voppanadakalliṁdaṁ mūḍalu gade 2 kaṁ nāghaṁḍugadalu gade mu 3 mādana gade 1 ke ha 30 Astāna gadde mu 1 . Ādaro
ḷage mūḍa kēsavage hoṁ 5 kuṁjārana kaṭiṁda mūḍalu gade mu 1 hā 30 Adara kaḷagaṇa gade mu 1 hā 10 voḍi
dha gade mu 1 bāḷeya maṁṇina keḷagaṇagade 1 kke mu 1 . Āṁtu gade 7 ke nāghaṁḍugadalu naṁma mūlada bāḷu mu 9 hā 25 A
ṣṭaroḷagaṇa kaḷa maneṭhāvu bāvi A staḷadoḷage navage A¨rddhabhāgi Astānagadeya mēlaṇa tōṭadoḷage namage Ā¨rdhabhāgi keṟe
saha hariyapaseṭiya Āḷiya duggaseṭiya kayya giḷiyārada Ūru nālvaru Ā 52 praje madhyastanu voppi koṭa patrada kra
maveṁteṁdare taṁma prasta nimittavāgi tegadukoṁḍa doḍavaraha ga 60 Akṣāradalu Aṟuvattu varaha yī varahana ba
ḍḍi hariyapa kaṭuteṟina bage gadde mu 6 vureceṭṭina bage muḍi 3 taṁna bage kajina bāḷu muḍi 2 hā 7 bōgā
ṟana bāḷa paḍuvalu muḍi 1 kāhu guḍena kuṟe kaṭuteṟina bage ha 7 Ā Urunālaru madhyastaru vopikoṭa bālu hadi mu
ṟu muḍi koṭanu Anāya baṁdare tāU tettu kālakālakke kāhisikoḍuvaru baḍaga kaipāḍivoḷage duggaseṭṭige nāraṇahōḷara vīra
ṁṇa hōḷaru koṭṭa patrada kramaveṁteṁdare tānu bada braṁhādāyadamūlada bāḷa cattusīmeya vivara mūḍalu hoḷeyiṁdaṁ
paḍuvalu teṁkalu seṭiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu samudradiṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu japadasaṁkara karaṁtana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ
teṁkalu yiṁtī bāḷu nāghaṁḍugadalu muḍi 1 . Akṣaradalu muḍi 1 . biḍāruvāravāgi yirisi tagadu koṭadu bārakūra pariva
¨rttanege saluva doḍḍavaraha 55 [Akṣā]radalu varaha Ayivattayidu kuṣṇakāraṁtana hoṇe viśvāsada bāḷu voḷahara bā
ḷu giḷiyārada bāḷu Aṁtu Akki muḍi 60 maṭhada dha¨rmakke Aliṁdaṁ hoṟagaṇa Aki gōpināthadēva
rige matta ramaya hake gōpināthadēvara pūjā sēveyanuThe inscription is left unfinished.
Digital edition of SII 7.345 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
